Deep Research Cloud

AI-powered research reports on AWS & cloud technology

Placeholder — React SPA coming soon

Architecture

  • AgentCore Runtime — Strands SDK agent
  • Lambda MCP Servers (fetch, aws-docs, brave, github, feeds)
  • API Gateway REST + WebSocket
  • Cognito authentication
  • CloudFront + S3 distribution
  • ADOT/OpenTelemetry observability
  • CloudWatch dashboard + budget alarms
